backend/main.mo: Main actor for the ICP backend defining song submission types, status management, admin operations, and integrations with storage, authorization, invite links, Stripe, and user approval modules.
backend/migration.mo: Data migration module that initializes the `topVibingSongs` map and size counter on canister upgrade.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (Top Vibing Songs management, artwork upload, landing page section) to their source files, components, and test IDs with confidence ratings.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated summary document describing the purpose and key changes of each frontend source file in the project.
frontend/DEPLOYMENT.md: Documents deployment fixes including creation of `config.ts`, resilient actor initialization, and restoration of song submission workflow features from Draft Version 70.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS stylesheet defining OKLCH-based design tokens for light and dark themes including colors, borders, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point setting the page title to 'INDIE TAMIL MUSIC PRODUCTION - Music Distribution Platform' and mounting the React app via `main.tsx`.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React application component that sets up TanStack Router with routes for landing, user dashboard, admin dashboard, thank-you, and song pages, and handles authentication state and profile setup modal.
frontend/src/components/AdminAnnouncemen: Empty file with no content; likely a placeholder for an admin announcement UI component.
frontend/src/components/AdminArtistManag: Admin component for managing artist profiles with search, edit, and delete functionality. Displays a filterable list of artist profiles with contact/social info and action buttons.
frontend/src/components/AdminBlogManagem: Empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/components/AdminEditArtistD: Dialog component for admins to edit an existing artist profile, including fields for personal info, social links, and profile photo upload with progress tracking.
frontend/src/components/AdminEditSubmiss: Dialog component for admins to edit a song submission, supporting fields for metadata, artist selection, file uploads (artwork/audio), and album tracks.
frontend/src/components/AdminEditVideoDi: Dialog component for admins to edit a video submission, allowing updates to title, description, category, tags, and optional replacement of thumbnail, artwork, and video files.
frontend/src/components/AdminFeaturedArt: Admin component for managing featured artist slots, allowing admins to set artist info, songs, photo URL, and toggle slot visibility per slot index.
frontend/src/components/AdminFeeManageme: Empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/components/AdminManageLinks: A dialog component that allows admins to update Spotify and Apple Music streaming links for a song submission, with URL validation and toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/AdminMonthlyList: An admin panel component for managing monthly listener statistics for live songs, supporting selecting a song, viewing existing stats, and adding/saving new listener entries by month and year.
frontend/src/components/AdminPodcastSubm: An admin component for reviewing and moderating podcast show and episode submissions, supporting status changes (approve, reject, live) and file downloads.
frontend/src/components/AdminProfileEdit: An empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/components/AdminStats.tsx: An empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/components/AdminSubmissions: An admin component that lists all song submissions with controls to update status, set live URLs, add remarks/comments, delete submissions, edit details, and manage streaming links.
frontend/src/components/AdminSubscriptio: An admin component for creating, editing, and deleting subscription plans, with a form for plan name, price, benefits, and redirect URL.
frontend/src/components/AdminSupportRequ: An empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/components/AdminTeamManagem: An admin component for generating and displaying unused team invite codes, with copy-to-clipboard functionality for sharing invite links.
frontend/src/components/AdminTopVibingSo: Admin component for managing 'Top Vibing Songs' with full CRUD operations, artwork upload with preview, form validation, and drag-and-drop reordering of songs by rank.
frontend/src/components/AdminUserManagem: Admin component for managing artist/user accounts, supporting search, category filtering, and toggling song/podcast submission block statuses per user.
frontend/src/components/AdminUserRoleMan: Admin component for promoting users to admin or demoting existing admins by principal ID, with copy-to-clipboard support and guard against removing the last admin.
frontend/src/components/AdminVerificatio: Admin component that lists artist verification requests with status badges and actions to approve, reject, or extend verification with configurable days.
frontend/src/components/AdminVideoSubmis: Admin component for managing video submissions with status filtering, status updates (including live URL requirement), download, edit, and delete functionality.
frontend/src/components/AlbumTracksEdito: A form component for managing album tracks, allowing users to add, remove, and edit track metadata fields (title, artist, composer, etc.) and upload audio files with progress tracking.
frontend/src/components/AnnouncementPopu: Empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/components/ArtistNameWithVe: Displays an artist's name alongside a verified or green badge based on the artist's verification status fetched via a query hook.
frontend/src/components/ArtistProfilesCh: A checkbox list component for selecting multiple artist profiles, displaying stage name and full name with optional helper text when nothing is selected.
A form for creating or editing an artist profile, including fields for personal info, social links, and profile photo upload with progress tracking, with editing locked when the profile is approved.
frontend/src/components/ClaimYouTubeCopy: Empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/components/ConnectInstagram: Empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/components/DashboardPublish: Empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: A simple footer component displaying the current year copyright notice and a support email link for Indie Tamil Music Production.
frontend/src/components/GeneralSupportTa: Empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/components/GreenBadge.tsx: Renders a green tick badge image with a tooltip labeled 'Artist', supporting small, medium, and large size variants.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: A sticky site header with the app title, theme toggle, and login/logout button using Internet Identity, optionally showing the first artist profile's photo and name when authenticated.
frontend/src/components/MostVibingArtist: A carousel component displaying featured artists with blurred background photos, fire-glow styled names, about blurbs, and linked featured tracks fetched from the backend.
frontend/src/components/PodcastEpisodeFo: A form for creating a podcast episode, handling show selection, metadata fields, content flags, and uploading thumbnail, artwork, and media files with per-file progress tracking.
A form component for creating a new podcast show, handling title, description, type, category, language, and artwork upload with submission-block checking and upload progress tracking.
frontend/src/components/PricingSection.t: Displays subscription plans fetched from the backend in a responsive card grid, each with benefits list and a button that opens the plan's redirect URL.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: A modal/page shown to new users prompting them to enter their name, which is then saved via the saveCallerUserProfile mutation to complete profile setup.
frontend/src/components/SongSubmissionFo: A comprehensive song submission form supporting single and album releases, with file uploads for artwork (validated at 3000×3000) and audio, artist selection, and submission-block checking.
frontend/src/components/StreamingPlatfor: A styled anchor button component that renders a branded link to a specific streaming platform (Spotify, Apple Music, etc.) with its logo and an external link icon.
frontend/src/components/TopVibingSongsSe: Displays a ranked grid of top vibing songs with artwork, rank badge, tagline, and listen buttons, fetched via the getRankedTopVibingSongs query.
frontend/src/components/UserAnalysisPane: Shows a monthly listeners analytics panel for the current user's live songs, displaying per-song listener history sorted by year and month descending.
frontend/src/components/UserArtistProfil: Displays and manages a user's artist profiles with options to create, edit, and delete profiles, showing contact and social media info for each. Uses dialogs and alert dialogs for create/edit/delete flows.
frontend/src/components/UserEditSubmissi: A dialog form for editing an existing song submission, supporting file uploads for artwork and audio, artist profile selection, and album track editing. Pre-populates fields from the existing submission and submits changes via the editSongSubmission mutation.
frontend/src/components/UserEditVideoDia: A dialog form for editing an existing video submission, allowing updates to title, description, category, tags, thumbnail, artwork, and video file with upload progress tracking. Submits changes via the updateVideoSubmission mutation.
frontend/src/components/UserPodcastSubmi: Renders a tabbed interface for managing podcast shows and episodes, allowing users to view their shows, create new shows, and add episodes. Lazily loads episodes per show on expansion.
frontend/src/components/UserSubmissionsL: Lists a user's song submissions with status badges and metadata, and opens an edit dialog for submissions in draft, pending, or rejected states.
frontend/src/components/UserVideoSubmiss: Displays a list of the current user's video submissions with status badges, thumbnails, and metadata. Allows editing submissions that are in 'pending' or 'rejected' status via a dialog.
frontend/src/components/VerificationBene: Renders a card promoting the Verified Artist program to unverified users, listing benefits and providing an apply button that triggers the verification mutation.
frontend/src/components/VerificationRene: Shows a renewal prompt card for users whose verified artist status has expired, listing lost benefits and providing a renew button.
frontend/src/components/VerifiedBadge.ts: Renders a blue-tick verified badge image in small, medium, or large sizes with a tooltip indicating 'Verified Artist / Pro User'.
frontend/src/components/VideoSubmissionF: Form component for submitting video content including title, description, category, tags, thumbnail, artwork, and video file uploads with progress tracking and navigation to a thank-you page on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using the current Internet Identity, initializing access control and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and identity persistence across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend interactions including user profiles, artist profiles, song/podcast/video submissions, admin checks, and other data operations using the actor pattern.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives and defines light/dark mode CSS custom properties for the design system's color tokens.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboard.tsx: Admin dashboard page with tabbed navigation covering artists, song/podcast/video submissions, verification, users, subscription plans, featured artists, top vibing songs, and role management.
frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: Public landing page featuring a hero section with Internet Identity login, featured artists carousel, top vibing songs, and a features/pricing section with post-login routing based on admin status.
frontend/src/pages/SongPage.tsx: Public song detail page that displays artwork, title, artist info, streaming platform links, and metadata for a given song ID fetched from the backend.
frontend/src/pages/ThankYouPage.tsx: Confirmation page shown after a successful song submission, with a link to navigate back to the user dashboard.
frontend/src/pages/UserDashboard.tsx: Authenticated user dashboard with tabs for managing artist profiles, submitting songs/podcasts/videos, viewing submissions, top vibing songs, and analysis.
Utility function that fetches bytes from an ExternalBlob and triggers a browser file download with a given filename.
frontend/src/utils/fileToExternalBlob.ts: Utility function that converts a browser File or Blob into a backend ExternalBlob, with optional upload progress tracking.
frontend/src/utils/isValidUrl.ts: Simple utility that validates whether a string is a non-empty URL starting with http:// or https://.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with helpers to persist/retrieve values via sessionStorage and clean sensitive params from the URL bar.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with dark mode, custom OKLCH-based color tokens, border radius, accordion keyframes, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state snapshot describing a music platform built with React/TypeScript (Vite) and a Motoko backend on Internet Computer, tracking existing features, architectural notes, and known build issues.
